expected_behavior: Control Center, Electron shell, and full app should share one persisted locale source of truth.
likely_cause: The Control Center uses the desktop IPC locale store while the full finance app persists a separate app locale, so switching in one surface can drift from the other.
notes: Source-audited from src/renderer/i18n.tsx and vendor/frontend/src/i18n/index.tsx; this is a systemic root cause, not just a single string leak.
verification_notes: Verified by both focused i18n tests and the final packaged sweep. `vendor/frontend/src/i18n/__tests__/i18n.test.tsx` passed, and the final packaged audit kept German intact in `control-center-de-postauth.json` after switching from the full app back to the Control Center.
